productName: SF FIR JF - 1G - Chocolope - Haze - SAT - CR
description: An all-in-one sativa disposable vape preloaded with Chocolope oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of coffee, nutty, and chestnut, delivering a clear, creative buzz.
